title: Nomad's Rest
body:
# 🛏️ Nomad’s Rest – Overhauled Beds & Sleeping

Nomad’s Rest changes how sleeping works in Minecraft. Beds are no longer portable shortcuts, and sleeping now happens in real-time. Prepare for travel or settle down — rest has new meaning.

---

# 💤 Features at a Glance

### ⏳ Sleeping Changes
- Sleeping now **speeds up time** instead of skipping to morning.
- Nearby chunks and entities **continue ticking** while you sleep.
- The screen goes to pitch black instead of just dimmed to prevent exploits with skipping time
---

### 🛠️ General Bed Mechanics
- **Beds and bedrolls** both require **supporting blocks underneath** to be placed.
- If either supporting block is broken, the bed or bedroll will **break automatically**.
---

### 🧶 New Item – Bedroll
- **Bedrolls** are **portable** and **do not set your spawn point**.
- Useful for **traveling players** and **temporary camps**.
- **Doesn't negate** any **fall damage** when fallen on

---

### 🛏️ Bed Changes
- Beds are now **stationary** — breaking them drops materials instead.
- **Crafting a bed now requires a Bedroll**, adding a step to the process.
- Makes players **craft a Bedroll first** before upgrading to a full bed.


---

Nomad’s Rest makes sleep more immersive and balanced, especially for players on the move.
